[[File:Lottery Choice Pack Details.png|300px]]

The {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Choice Pack|orange}} is a reward from [[Lottery_Machine#Weekly_Lottery_Event|Weekly Lottery Event]].

After receiving the Lottery Choice Pack, you may choose a reward from the Pack!

* {{RewardIconWithLink|CIV Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|ART Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|TECH Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|FTH Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Relic Album, +10 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|FAME Master Scroll, +40|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
